aice.llm_image.name: Image Name
aice.llm_image.label: Image Tag
aice.llm_image.community_registry_fetch_: Failed to fetch community model list
aice.hf.registry_hint: Hugging Face model search is provided by the platform API huggingface-search
aice.hf.search_q_placeholder: Substring search on repo and username, e.g. clip
aice.hf.search_q_required_tip: Please enter a search query (search) first
aice.hf.search_author_placeholder: Filter by author or org, e.g. openai
aice.container_secret.env_hint: Keys are passed to the container as environment variables; values are the corresponding env values.
aice.container_secret.export_keys_tip: Selected keys will be passed to the LLM instance container as environment variables.
aice.openclaw.workspace_templates_tip: Optional: leave empty to use defaults; empty values will not override.
aice.openclaw.channels_extra: Select channels to enable; selected channels can be configured below (only when creating new credential).
aice.openclaw.channel_config_hint: Configuration for selected channels. All optional; leave empty to use defaults.
aice.openclaw.ai_providers.intro: Different providers correspond to the following KEYs. Select an existing container secret or fill the form below to create a new one and reference it.
aice.openclaw.credential_mode.new: Fill form and create new secret
aice.openclaw.credential_mode.label: Configuration
aice.openclaw.new_credential_name_tip: The new container secret will store the KEYs you enter below and be referenced by this plan.
aice.openclaw.manual_config_tip: When enabled, provider and channel env vars are not injected. Users configure them after entering the desktop.
aice.openclaw.provider_select_tip: Select providers first; the corresponding KEYs will be shown below for you to fill. Multiple selection supported; at least one required.
aice.openclaw.provider_select_first: Select one or more providers above; the KEYs to fill will appear here.
aice.openclaw.override_url_optional: Optional; leave empty to use the default URL.
aice.openclaw.provider_filter_empty: No matching KEYs. Change the keyword or clear the filter.
aice.openclaw.ai_providers.at_least_one: At least one AI provider KEY is required (e.g. ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY).
aice.openclaw.sku_providers_note: The following is the configuration of the linked LLM plan (SKU).
aice.openclaw.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: Anthropic API key for Claude models.
aice.openclaw.env.OPENAI_API_KEY: OpenAI API key for GPT models.
aice.openclaw.env.MOONSHOT_API_KEY: Moonshot API key for Kimi K2.5.
aice.openclaw.env.DEEPGRAM_API_KEY: Deepgram API key for audio transcription.
aice.openclaw.env.AWS_SESSION_TOKEN: Optional session token for temporary credentials.
aice.openclaw.env.BEDROCK_PROVIDER_FILTE: Bedrock model discovery filter, JSON array or comma-separated.
aice.openclaw.env.VLLM_BASE_URL: vLLM OpenAI-compatible base URL, e.g. http://10.0.0.1:8000/v1.
aice.openclaw.env.VLLM_API_KEY: Optional. If your vLLM deployment requires auth, set the API key/token here.
aice.openclaw.env.AI_GATEWAY_BASE_URL: Custom base URL for AI gateway (e.g. Cloudflare AI Gateway). Applied to the matching provider based on URL suffix.
aice.openclaw.env.MOONSHOT_BASE_URL: Override Moonshot API base URL. Default: https://api.moonshot.cn/v1
aice.openclaw.env.KIMI_BASE_URL: Override Kimi Coding API base URL. Default: https://api.moonshot.ai/anthropic
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_DM_PO: DM access policy: pairing, allowlist, open, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_ALLOW: Comma-separated allowlist of user IDs/usernames. Required when dmPolicy=allowlist or open (use *).
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_GROUP: Group access policy: open, allowlist, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_REPLY: Reply threading: off, first, or all.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_CHUNK: Outbound split mode: length or newline.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_STREA: Draft streaming: off, partial, or block.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_LINK_: Toggle link previews for outbound messages.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_REACT: Which reactions trigger events: off, own, or all.
Agent reaction capability: off, ack, minimal, or extensive.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_INLIN: Inline button capability: off, dm, group, all, or allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_PROXY: Proxy URL for Bot API calls (SOCKS/HTTP).
aice.host_paths.extra: Add multiple host paths and configure mount mappings for different container indices (keys in containers must be strings, e.g. "0").
aice.host_paths.auto_create_config.title: Auto-create config
aice.host_paths.auto_create_config.uid.p: File owner uid in the container (optional)
aice.host_paths.auto_create_config.gid.p: File group gid in the container (optional)
aice.host_paths.propagation.private: Mounts are not propagated; changes on host and container are isolated
aice.host_paths.propagation.rslave: Host mount changes propagate recursively to the container, but not vice versa
aice.host_paths.propagation.rshared: Mount changes propagate bidirectionally and recursively between host and container
aice.openclaw.channel.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHO: Enable webhook mode with public endpoint URL.
Local webhook path for incoming updates.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_BOT_TO: Discord bot token. Enable MESSAGE CONTENT INTENT in Discord Developer Portal.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_DM_POL: DM access policy: pairing, allowlist, open, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_DM_ALL: Comma-separated user IDs/names for DM allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_GROUP_: Guild access policy: open, allowlist, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_REPLY_: Reply threading: off, first, or all.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_CHUNK_: Outbound split mode: length or newline.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.DISCORD_REACTI: Which reactions trigger events: off, own, all, or allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_BOT_TOKE: Slack bot token (xoxb-...). Both bot + app token required for Slack.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_USER_TOK: Slack user token (xoxp-...). Optional, for user-level API calls.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_SIGNING_: Signing secret for HTTP mode verification.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_DM_POLIC: DM access policy: pairing or open.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_DM_ALLOW: Comma-separated user IDs/handles for DM allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_GROUP_PO: Channel access policy: open, allowlist, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_REPLY_TO: Reply threading: off, first, or all.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.SLACK_REACTION: Which reactions trigger events: off, own, or all.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_ENABL: Set to true to enable WhatsApp channel. Uses QR/pairing code auth at runtime.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_DM_PO: DM access policy: pairing, allowlist, open, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_ALLOW: Comma-separated E.164 phone numbers for DM allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_SELF_: Enable when running on your personal WhatsApp number.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_GROUP: Group access policy: open, disabled, or allowlist.
Comma-separated E.164 phone numbers for group sender allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_MEDIA: Inbound media save cap in MB.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_HISTO: Recent unprocessed messages inserted for group context.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_DM_HI: DM history limit in user turns.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_SEND_: Send read receipts (blue ticks) on message receipt.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.WHATSAPP_ACK_R: Emoji sent on message receipt (e.g. 👀). Omit to disable.
Send ack reactions in DM chats.
Group reaction behavior: always, mentions, or never.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_APP_ID: Feishu/Lark app ID (e.g. cli_xxx). Both app ID and secret required to enable.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_BOT_NAM: Bot display name for the main account.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_DOMAIN: API domain: feishu (default) or lark for international tenants.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_DM_POLI: DM access policy: pairing, allowlist, open, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_GROUP_P: Group policy: open, allowlist, or disabled.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_ALLOW_F: Comma-separated Open IDs for DM allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_GROUP_A: Comma-separated group chat IDs (e.g. oc_xxx) for allowlist.
aice.openclaw.channel.env.FEISHU_RESOLVE: Resolve sender display names (extra API calls).
aice.openclaw.primary_model_extra: Optional. Override the auto-selected primary model. Format: provider/model-id (e.g. anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929). Leave empty to use auto-selection.
aice.container_port_mapping_tip: Configure the container listening port. The system will automatically allocate an external access port and complete the mapping.
aice.access_port_from_instance: Access port shown in the instance
aice.name_repeat_extra: Name supports ordered suffix placeholder '#'. Example: name host##, count 2, creates host01, host02; existing names get next number.
aice.image.label: Image Tag
aice.container_port.message: Container port must be in range 0-65535
aice.backup.diskbackup.title: Disk Backup
aice.restart_with_image_tip: If not selected and not updating image by spec, image will not change
aice.restart_with_spec_tip: If not selected, specification will not change
aice.probed_status.title: Install Status
aice.llm_type.no_params_hint: No additional parameters for this type
